overview: SustainIQ is a gamified carbon footprint awareness and action platform that helps users estimate their environmental impact, discover financial savings from eco-friendly choices, and take meaningful action through challenges, offsets, and community sharing.
features: Interactive carbon footprint calculator with real-time animated counters
Eco-Financial ROI simulator showing CO2 vs money saved
Reverse-Cart e-commerce simulator with sustainable alternatives
Vampire Power interactive room finder for standby drains
Micro-Offset market with virtual forest visualization
Eco-Score badge system and social share kit
